sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Why Hershey Stock Soared Today
feed.summary: In 2016, Mondelez International failed in its attempt to buy Hershey ( NYSE: HSY ) . Now more than eight years later, Mondelez is reportedly trying again.According to Bloomberg, Mondelez just approached Hershey in hopes of acquiring it. And that's why Hershey stock was up 12% as of 1:30 p.m.
